site.title: Paulo Tuya | Delivery, Partnerships & Operations
site.description: Portfolio of Paulo Tuya, a delivery and partnerships operator across gaming, esports, and remote programs.

hero.name: I turn partner and project goals into clear execution
hero.pitch: Delivery, partnerships, and operations across gaming, esports, and remote programs.

values.title: How I Work
values.subtitle: Clear scope, aligned stakeholders, and steady operational control.
values.card1Text: I turn loose goals into scopes, owners, timelines, and operating artifacts that make execution easier to trust.
values.card2Text: I keep partners, teams, vendors, and internal stakeholders aligned without letting handoffs or approvals derail delivery.
values.card3Text: I care about readiness, issue handling, and closeout quality as much as kickoff energy, because delivery is judged at the finish line.

skills.title: Capability Clusters
skills.subtitle: Planning, partner-facing work, and execution systems that keep delivery clear and reliable.
